did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The paper is a review article that discusses the role of artificial intelligence (AI) and machine learning (ML) in melanoma diagnosis and treatment, specifically mentioning convolutional neural networks (CNNs) and explainable AI (XAI). However, it does not use AI/ML to obtain its own study results; rather, it synthesizes existing literature on the topic.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
